form.formComment: Yet to break through in seven runs, the latest effort a second over 295m at this track in 17.44. Has been in the placings at his last two starts. Racing well and is the testing material.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and faltered around bend lost ground.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.85) at Ascot Park in a Class 0, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Debutant by Dyna Villa from Homebush Fanta. Trained by Jonathan Mcinerney. Did run third in a trial (17.32) on this track over 295m. Market moves likely to signal ability but profiles strongly for this.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2 lengths at Ascot Park over 390m (23.01) beating Rocking Rory in Class 0 on April 15. Can make it two on the bounce.
